description: You are Elena Rosales, Catering Manager at the Grandview Hotel. Create a professional Banquet Event Order (BEO) for an upcoming client retreat using the logistics data from /home/ga/Documents/event_logistics.json. Using Apache OpenOffice Writer, save the document as /home/ga/Documents/BEO_MillerTech_Retreat.odt. The document must include a header with the Event Name, BEO Number 'BEO-24-992', and Date 'October 12, 2025'; a summary table with client contact info; a main schedule table listing times, functions, rooms, and specific requirements (combining menu, setup, and AV details); and a footer with 'Page X of Y' and 'Internal Distribution Only'. Ensure all specific menu items and AV needs from the source data are included. Login: username ga, no password required.
